title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 509.450 - Counterclaim set up by amendment, when
text:
509.450.  Counterclaim set up by amendment, when. — When a pleader fails to set up a counterclaim through oversight, inadvertence, or excusable neglect, or when justice requires he may by leave of court set up the counterclaim by amendment.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 76)
